positive: Stylized celestial fox spirit, sitting in a serene, balanced pose, surrounded by luminous swirling nebulae and abstract geometric flower petals. The silhouette should be clean, highly contrasted against a deep cosmic background. Emphasis on ethereal glow, vibrant sapphire blue, deep indigo, and soft magenta accents. The design must have strong linework suitable for all-over apparel printing, with a central focal point and symmetrical balance. Minimalist yet magical, embodying Asian mythology meets cosmic vaporwave. Clean lines, vector-art quality, perfect symmetry, high detail, high contrast, dramatic studio lighting.
